_comment: Per-desk model routing (research.25). ALL DESKS -> DeepSeek (Mike-direct S332): the C102 test showed DeepSeek produced canon-accurate, in-voice, 0-hallucination articles on all 4 desks (incl civic+sports) at ~$0.003 vs Sonnet's ~$1.50. Sonnet bought no quality; article voice is an agent-stance property, not a model one. Override per-run with --provider/--model if ever needed.
